declared_unit: One bearing unit which consists of one inner ring, one outer ring, rollers and a retainer, corresponding to 30.10 Kg.
modules_reported: Upstream, Core, Downstream (cradle-to-grave, per PCR 2023:03 modular structure)
note: This EPD follows PCR 2023:03 (bearings) which reports modules as Upstream / Core / Downstream rather than EN 15804 A1-A3. No explicit A1-A3 column exists. The production-stage equivalent (A1-A3) was approximated by summing the Upstream + Core columns: GWP-fossil 1.63E+02+3.22E+02=485; GWP-biogenic -1.84E+01+-1.05E-01=-18.5; GWP-total 1.45E+02+3.22E+02=467. Downstream (end-of-life) was excluded. No separate GWP-GHG (excl. biogenic) row is reported. For reference, the cradle-to-grave TOTAL values are: fossil 4.85E+02, biogenic 0.00E+00, total 4.87E+02 kg CO2 eq.
